curation_notes: The advisory explicitly names adherents/subscription/info.php and the rowid parameter as the SQL injection vector. The patch commit fixes this by replacing raw $_GET/$_POST access with GETPOST('rowid','int') which enforces integer type. The commit also hardens several other files (cashdesk templates, multiprix.php, fourn/index.php, main.inc.php) but the CVE specifically targets the subscription info page. Marked noisy because 10 non-test source files were changed in the patch.
